name: Threads of Fate

acts.name: The Relic Is Missing! / Harlan Is in Danger!
Find the Relic / Recover the Relic
At the Station / Friends in High Places
Trial of the Huntress / The Guardian's Inquiry

intro_text: Back in Arkham, everything has gone wrong at once. The relic has vanished from Harlan's study, and Harlan himself is missing.
Three urgent threads pull at you simultaneously — find the stolen relic, locate Alejandro (Harlan's contact), and determine what the Brotherhood of the Beast wants with your expedition.
You have limited time. The doom clock advances whether or not you chase every lead. Choose wisely.
setup_instructions: This scenario has three parallel act decks. During setup, the game master selects which acts are active based on campaign log entries from Scenarios 1 and 2.
Place all three Arkham locations (Velma's Diner, Curiositie Shoppe, Town Hall) face-up. Investigators may move freely between them.
Each investigator begins at Velma's Diner.
Shuffle the Threads of Fate and Brotherhood of the Beast encounter sets together into the encounter deck.
The scenario ends when all three act decks are resolved or the agenda advances past its final doom threshold.

resolutions.R1: You recover the relic, rescue Alejandro, and unmask the Brotherhood's agent. Record in the campaign log: *Investigators resolved all three threads.* Each investigator earns 3 experience.
resolutions.R2: You resolve two of the three threads. Record in the campaign log which threads remain unresolved. Each investigator earns 2 experience.
resolutions.R3: Only one thread is resolved. The Brotherhood grows stronger. Each investigator earns 1 experience.
resolutions.defeat: The Brotherhood completes its ritual. Each investigator suffers 1 mental trauma.
